research.summary: Frank Green is an Australian reusable drinkware and lifestyle brand known for design-led water bottles, ceramic reusable cups, food containers and accessories. The brand positions sustainability as colourful, personal and fashionable rather than utilitarian, with a strong emphasis on customisation, colour mixing and everyday convenience.
research.essence: Stylish reusables that make sustainable habits feel personal, colourful and premium.
research.voice: Bright, upbeat, conversational and design-conscious; mixes eco-minded messaging with playful product language, colour-focused merchandising and lifestyle-led encouragement.

palette.role: deep green-black / premium contrast and text

research.aesthetic: Clean, colour-blocked product photography built around Frank Green bottles and cups on pastel seamless studio backgrounds, tiled flat lays and smooth matte surfaces. Images use soft, even daylight or diffused studio lighting with minimal shadow, often front-lit or slightly side-lit to keep colours true. Styling is medium-density: products are grouped by colour families, stacked with lids, straws, bags and small lifestyle props, but compositions remain orderly and graphic. Crops are tight and social-first, including centred hero products, close-ups of lids and handles, top-down grids, and hand-held lifestyle shots. The feed mixes product-only studio images with casual model or hand-in-frame content in cafes, cars, beaches, gyms and daily commuting settings. Colour grade is bright, clean and pastel-saturated, with low contrast, creamy whites and an emphasis on mix-and-match colour combinations.

Pick and change the colour of lid and the triple-wall vacuum insulation base that retains temperature for hours, plus the ceramic lining ensures your water always tastes like water (no metallic flavours here). Designed with premium materials BPA free, FDA EU approved safe materials Dishwasher-safe lid. Base is hand wash only. Microwave

catalog.name: Titan Straw Lid with Strap & Straw
catalog.description: There's a reason our straw lid is so popular. It comes with a handy strap for carrying on the go, a removable stainless steel straw and clicks shut for no spills while in your bag. It can be mixed and matched with both your ceramic stainless steel or original frank green reusable products and comes with everything you need to use straight away. catalog.name: Titan Flip Straw Lid with Strap & Straw
catalog.description: You'll flipping love this lid! A touch-free lid that's perfect for on the go. Just slide the button and the mouthpiece will flip up for easy one-handed hydration. Designed with extra durable material and a soft-feel silicone mouthpiece. Includes: lid hull, Reusable Strap and Reusable Stainless Steel Straw. Psst... the straw in the image is for display purposes only. You may receive a silver or a gold coloured straw.

catalog.name: Titan Reusable Bottle Base
catalog.description: Two litres? Too easy. The Titan is ready to tackle your daily hydration goals. The measurement markers keeps your water intake in check and the wide mouth fits ice cubes with ease. Crafted from durable, BPA-free Tritan®, it’s lightweight and shatter-resistant. catalog.name: Grip and Sip Lid
catalog.description: Grip it. Flip it. Sip it. This lid is totally leak-proof, with a fast-pour flow and a hygienic spout cover that keeps things clean between sips. It fits every frank green bottle and is built tough to go wherever you do, no fuss. Ergonomic Grip Handle Fast-Flow Chugger Spout Leak-Proof Closure Hygienic Flip Cover Universally fits all frank green bases Dishwasher Safe Impact Resistant Construction BPA-Free Non-Toxic Materials
